about.title: About Me
about.description: I'm a motivated junior frontend developer passionate about building modern web applications with {framework}. Through Frontend Mentor challenges, I've honed my skills in creating pixel-perfect, responsive interfaces. I'm eager to learn, adapt quickly, and bring fresh ideas to a development team while continuously expanding my skillset.
